hero.eyebrow: Building the digital future from Syria
hero.subtitle: We connect Syrian tech talent with regional investment — turning bold visions into sustainable digital products.

about.title: A team of engineers, operators, and partnership builders.
about.body: We were founded on a simple idea — Syria has world-class technical talent and an underserved market. So we built a company that delivers production-grade software and telecom infrastructure for local clients, while making it easier for international partners to invest, hire, and launch from inside Syria.

stats.desc: Projects delivered — from MVPs to telecom network rollouts.
stats.label: Production

stats.desc: Long-term clients across finance, retail, and the public sector.
stats.label: Trust

services.title: Engineering across the full stack
services.sub: Four practices, one delivery model. Cross-functional pods that ship from architecture to production.

web.title: Web Engineering
web.desc: Next.js, distributed systems, design-system-driven product surfaces. Built for performance budgets that matter.

mobile.title: Mobile Platforms
mobile.desc: Native iOS / Android and React Native applications with offline-first architecture and CI-driven release pipelines.

cloud.title: Cloud Infrastructure
cloud.desc: AWS, GCP and Azure landing zones, IaC, Kubernetes, observability and FinOps governance for cost-aware scale.

ai.title: AI & ML Systems
ai.desc: Production LLM pipelines, RAG architectures, fine-tuning, evaluation harnesses and MLOps for measurable impact.

process.title: A delivery model designed for scale
process.sub: From discovery to production, every engagement runs on the same disciplined backbone.

steps.title: Discovery & Architecture
steps.desc: Stakeholder workshops, technical due diligence, system architecture and an executable roadmap.

steps.title: Design & Prototype
steps.desc: Design systems, interaction prototypes and engineering spikes to de-risk before build.

steps.title: Build & Integrate
steps.desc: Cross-functional pods shipping in two-week increments with continuous integration and review.

steps.title: Scale & Operate
steps.desc: Production hardening, observability, SRE on-call and continuous performance tuning.
